author: Ananya Gairola
headline: Amazon-Backed Anthropic,  Pentagon Clash Over AI Safeguards — Officials Push Back Against Limits On Autonomous Weapons, Surveillance: Report
summary: Amazon-backed Anthropic is in a standoff with the Pentagon over AI safeguards for autonomous weapons and surveillance.

author: Badar Shaikh
headline: Gary Black Says Tesla's Autonomous Efforts Could Receive Major Setback Following Waymo Crash: Here's Why
summary: Gary Black warns regulatory probes into Tesla's AV competitors could pose challenges for the EV giant's self-driving ambitions.

author: Ananya Gairola
headline: Elon Musk Says 'Very Different' AI-First Phone Is 'Not Out Of The Question,' Even After Insisting He Hopes He Never Has To Make One
summary: Elon Musk said an AI-first, radically different phone is "not out of the question," even as he reiterated he hopes to avoid making one.

author: Kaustubh Bagalkote
headline: Unity, Take-Two Shares Sink After Google Unveils AI World-Building Tech 'Project Genie'
summary: Unity Software Inc (U) and Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc (TTWO) shares plummeted on Friday following the unveiling of Alphabet Inc's (GOOG) (GOOGL) experimental world-building technology.

author: Chris Katje
headline: Apple 'Selling Its Soul To The Devil'? Analyst Says Partnering With Alphabet Limits AI Upside
summary: Apple (AAPL) analysts are mixed on the company's upside after a record-breaking quarter, as concerns remain about AI monetization.

author: Anusuya Lahiri
headline: Alphabet Could Power Past Forecasts As AI Lifts Ads, Cloud: Analyst
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. expected to report strong Q4 earnings, with analyst predicting revenue and EPS beat and increased growth.

author: Josh Enomoto
headline: Options Corner: AI Industry Confusion Has Created A Massive Contrarian Opportunity In Unity Software
summary: While Unity Software is perceived to face a Google AI threat, the smart money sees the threat as orthogonal and are thus bullish on U stock.

author: Daragh Thomas
headline: Could A $1 Trillion OpenAI IPO Save The Day For Nvidia, Microsoft?
summary: OpenAI and Anthropic are expected to have IPOs in 2026, potentially driving up AI infrastructure spending and benefiting companies like Nvidia, Amazon, and Microsoft.

author: Ananya Gairola
headline: Ex-Google Engineer Faces Decades In Prison After Jury Finds He Stole AI Secrets For China
summary: A federal jury convicted former Google engineer Linwei Ding of stealing AI chip and supercomputer trade secrets to benefit China in the first U.S. AI economic espionage case, exposing him to decades in prison.

author: Ananya Gairola
headline: Nvidia's $100 Billion OpenAI Investment Plan Reportedly Hits Snag Amid Internal Concerns
summary: Nvidia's proposed $100 billion investment in OpenAI has reportedly stalled as CEO Jensen Huang raises concerns over the AI startup's spending discipline and intensifying competition, prompting both companies to reconsider a smaller, nonbinding equity deal even as OpenAI attracts heavy Big Tech interest and posts surging revenue.

author: Shomik Sen Bhattacharjee
headline: Demis Hassabis Tells Undergrads To Get 'Unbelievably Proficient' With AI Tools, Google DeepMind CEO Calls It Better Bet Than Traditional Internships
summary: AI tools may be a better bet for students than traditional internships. AI is disrupting junior roles as companies automate tasks. Technical fluency is a strong signal for employers, Demis Hassabis suggests.
